fieldDescription: Set this to true to disable this mod, preventing all messages from being shown.

secondaryValue: OFF, ALL, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL
fieldDescription:
Add logs in ./starsector.log of input level and above to the ConsoleCommands Console, provided that mod is enabled.
Does not show logs from before onApplicationLoad of this mod is called.

secondaryValue: OFF, ALL, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL
fieldDescription:
Show logs in ./starsector.log of input level and above as a message on the top left of the screen.
Does not show logs from before onApplicationLoad of this mod is called.
